description:
## Bug Report

**Category:** Functional
**Priority:** P1 (High)
**Component:** #pt-run-ggl-sanity button in Game Testing tab

### Steps to Reproduce
1. Navigate to http://localhost:4000
2. Click the Game Testing tab
3. Click the "Run GGL Sanity" button

### Expected Behavior
The button should trigger a GGL sanity test run (similar to Run Selected or Run All).

### Actual Behavior
Nothing happens. The button is completely non-functional — no click handler is registered in gamepulse.js.

### Test Reference
- Test file: tests/validation/dashboard-gametesting-full.spec.ts
- Test name: Run GGL Sanity button has a click handler
- Describe block: Game Testing Tab — Integration Flow

### Technical Details
- Selector: #pt-run-ggl-sanity
- File: dashboard/public/js/gamepulse.js
- The string "pt-run-ggl-sanity" does not appear anywhere in gamepulse.js
- The button is defined in dashboard/public/index.html line 261 but has no corresponding event listener
title: [Functional] Run GGL Sanity button has no click handler
